attributes.description: Per-game FPS, frame-time, and bottleneck analysis across all recorded sessions.

embeddableConfig.content:
## Game Performance
Per-game FPS, frame-time, and bottleneck analysis across all recorded sessions. Select a game in the filter above to focus the view. Use **GPU Driver** and **Proton Ver** filters to compare stack variants. For scheduler-level eBPF investigation, open **[Engine & Diagnostics](/app/dashboards#/view/rigsignal-engine)**. For hardware thermal context, open **[System Health](/app/dashboards#/view/rigsignal-system-health)**.

query.esql: FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | STATS Sessions = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.session.id)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | STATS Sessions = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.session.id)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | STATS `Avg FPS` = ROUND(AVG(rigsignal.fps.avg_1s), 1)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | STATS `Avg FPS` = ROUND(AVG(rigsignal.fps.avg_1s), 1)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | STATS `1% Low FPS` = ROUND(AVG(rigsignal.fps.low_1pct), 1)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | STATS `1% Low FPS` = ROUND(AVG(rigsignal.fps.low_1pct), 1)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | STATS `p99 Frametime ms` = ROUND(PERCENTILE(rigsignal.fps.frametime_ms, 99), 2)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | STATS `p99 Frametime ms` = ROUND(PERCENTILE(rigsignal.fps.frametime_ms, 99), 2)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | STATS `Stutter Events` = SUM(rigsignal.fps.stutter_count)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | STATS `Stutter Events` = SUM(rigsignal.fps.stutter_count)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | STATS `Total Hours` = ROUND(SUM(rigsignal.summary.duration_s) / 3600, 1)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | STATS `Total Hours` = ROUND(SUM(rigsignal.summary.duration_s) / 3600, 1)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | WHERE rigsignal.fps.avg_1s IS NOT NULL | STATS `Avg FPS` = AVG(rigsignal.fps.avg_1s) BY BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 minute), rigsignal.game.name
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | WHERE rigsignal.fps.avg_1s IS NOT NULL | STATS `Avg FPS` = AVG(rigsignal.fps.avg_1s) BY BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 minute), rigsignal.game.name
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | WHERE rigsignal.fps.frametime_ms IS NOT NULL | STATS `Avg Frametime ms` = AVG(rigsignal.fps.frametime_ms) BY BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 minute)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | WHERE rigsignal.fps.frametime_ms IS NOT NULL | STATS `Avg Frametime ms` = AVG(rigsignal.fps.frametime_ms) BY BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 minute)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | WHERE rigsignal.fps.stutter_count IS NOT NULL | STATS `Stutter Events` = SUM(rigsignal.fps.stutter_count) BY BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 minute)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | WHERE rigsignal.fps.stutter_count IS NOT NULL | STATS `Stutter Events` = SUM(rigsignal.fps.stutter_count) BY BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 minute)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | WHERE rigsignal.summary.bottleneck_dominant IS NOT NULL | STATS Sessions = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.session.id) BY rigsignal.summary.bottleneck_dominant | SORT Sessions DESC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | WHERE rigsignal.summary.bottleneck_dominant IS NOT NULL | STATS Sessions = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.session.id) BY rigsignal.summary.bottleneck_dominant | SORT Sessions DESC
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | WHERE rigsignal.gpu.utilisation_pct IS NOT NULL | STATS `GPU Utilisation %` = AVG(rigsignal.gpu.utilisation_pct) BY BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 minute)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | WHERE rigsignal.gpu.utilisation_pct IS NOT NULL | STATS `GPU Utilisation %` = AVG(rigsignal.gpu.utilisation_pct) BY BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 minute)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | WHERE rigsignal.cpu.total_utilisation_pct IS NOT NULL | STATS `CPU Utilisation %` = AVG(rigsignal.cpu.total_utilisation_pct) BY BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 minute)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | WHERE rigsignal.cpu.total_utilisation_pct IS NOT NULL | STATS `CPU Utilisation %` = AVG(rigsignal.cpu.total_utilisation_pct) BY BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 minute)

FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | STATS `Avg FPS` = ROUND(AVG(rigsignal.fps.avg_1s), 1), `1% Low FPS` = ROUND(AVG(rigsignal.fps.low_1pct), 1), `p99 Frametime ms` = ROUND(PERCENTILE(rigsignal.fps.frametime_ms, 99), 2), `Stutter Total` = SUM(rigsignal.fps.stutter_count) BY rigsignal.session.id, rigsignal.game.name | RENAME rigsignal.session.id AS `Session ID`, rigsignal.game.name AS `Game` | SORT `Avg FPS` DESC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | STATS `Avg FPS` = ROUND(AVG(rigsignal.fps.avg_1s), 1), `1% Low FPS` = ROUND(AVG(rigsignal.fps.low_1pct), 1), `p99 Frametime ms` = ROUND(PERCENTILE(rigsignal.fps.frametime_ms, 99), 2), `Stutter Total` = SUM(rigsignal.fps.stutter_count) BY rigsignal.session.id, rigsignal.game.name | RENAME rigsignal.session.id AS `Session ID`, rigsignal.game.name AS `Game` | SORT `Avg FPS` DESC

attributes.title: RigSignal: Game Performance
